title: Rich Crispy Greek Phyllo Baklava
description: A crispy and indulgent Greek dessert featuring raisins and caramelized phyllo, this baklava is a raw-friendly treat that is sure to satisfy any sweet tooth. It has a grassy and nutty flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Layer the phyllo dough in a large baking dish, brushing each layer with melted butter.
Mix the chopped walnuts, plump raisins, granulated sugar, ground cinnamon, and ground cardamom in a bowl.
Spread the walnut mixture over the phyllo dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the phyllo dough over the walnut mixture, brushing with melted butter to seal.
Cut the baklava into diamond shaped pieces, cutting all the way through to the bottom of the dish.
Bake the baklava for 45 minutes, or until the phyllo dough is golden brown.
Remove the baklava from the oven and let it cool completely.
Drizzle the pure honey over the cooled baklava.
Serve the baklava at room temperature, garnished with additional chopped walnuts if desired.
